priorities.title: Audio controls UI (Micro): split audioManager master gain into musicGain + sfxGain, HTML overlay with 2 toggles + 2 volume sliders, 4 localStorage keys, 'M' as global pause preserving per-channel state, LOCK §13.14.
priorities.council_waiver_reason: Micro tier user-path waiver per §Rule 17; mechanical UI work + 4 localStorage keys + GainNode split. PRIME-AUDIT covers it under batch.
priorities.check_method: Refactored audioManager.ts: master GainNode role preserved (M-key global pause target), 2 new children musicGain + sfxGain routed to master. Existing playClaveSFX/playFartSFX rerouted to sfxGainNode (was masterGain). Promoted playMusic local musicGain → shared module-level musicGainNode. Added setMusicMuted/setSfxMuted/setMusicVolume/setSfxVolume/getAudioSettings/clamp01 public API. localStorage schema 1→5 keys with try/catch + malformed-value fallback to defaults. New settingsOverlay.ts HTMLDivElement (position:fixed top:60 right:24 z-index:1000, 2 channel rows with on/off checkbox + 0..100 slider, closes on ✕/ESC/outside-click, keydown stopPropagation). main.ts: added ⚙ Pixi Text at (CANVAS_WIDTH-32, 30) eventMode='static' pointertap→overlay.toggle()+initAudio(). LOCKED §13.14 codified audio subsystem (graph diagram + 5-key schema + UI surfaces). Tests 346→356 (+12 new, -2 localStorage-dependent: clamp01 pure 4 tests, defaults, volume clamp music+sfx, per-channel mute independence, master preserves per-channel, toggleMute return). Typecheck exit 0. Build success 393 KB bundle (+5 KB). Preview verified: gear icon renders (1888,30,alpha=0.55,eventMode=static), overlay opens on pointertap, 4 inputs present, music slider=25 sfx slider=100 both checkboxes=true (defaults), input event on music slider value=50 → getAudioSettings().musicVolume=0.5, change event on sfx checkbox unchecked → sfxMuted=true. Push commit 5026282 to origin/master; GH Actions auto-deploy.

priorities.title: disruptionManager.ts extraction (Standard): pure-helper split of world.ts SEVER_BOND case (~70 LOC moved); world.ts 359 → 311 LOC (-48 LOC, -13%) closer to §XV 280 charter. Preserves S17 §13.11 LOCKED semantics bit-for-bit.
priorities.check_method: Council R1 (Grok DISRUPTOR 10 challenges + Gemini AUDITOR 8 findings) converged on effect-ordering BLOCKER: SEVER_ERASE must emit BEFORE topology mutation (reads live prims); BOND_SEVERED AFTER (end-of-operation audio marker). Adopted 7 Council items (canSeverBond + computeBaseCharge + computeSeverEraseEffects + applySeverTopology with charge decrement at orchestrator), rejected 2 NITs (Grok #1 severPos already pre-captured, Gemini #8 redundant given canSeverBond physics-cause early-return). disruptionManager.ts NEW 151 LOC: 4 pure helpers. world.ts SEVER_BOND case 70 LOC → 25 LOC orchestrator preserving original ordering: bond lookup → primA/primB fetch (Grok #2 pre-fetch) → severPos capture → canSeverBond gate → severSplit → cycle-adjusted charge calculation → charge decrement → emit erase effects → applySeverTopology → emit BOND_SEVERED. All S17 §13.11 LOCKED semantics preserved bit-for-bit (cross-player 1 charge, self-sever free, cycle no-consume, physics bypass, hostile-if-either-differs, placerColor immutable auth). Tests 356 → 370 (+14): canSeverBond × 5 (physics bypass, 1v1 wrong-turn reject, 0-charge hostile silent reject, 1-charge allowed, self-sever free), computeBaseCharge × 4 (physics 0, self 0, hostile 1, mixed-ownership 1), computeSeverEraseEffects × 2 (live-prim payload pos+radius, missing-prim defensive skip), applySeverTopology × 3 (single-bond cleanup, chain cascade, delBonds cascade). All 16+ existing SEVER_BOND regression tests pass unchanged. Typecheck exit 0. Build 393.82 KB main bundle (+0.31 KB net from extraction overhead). PRIME-AUDIT #5 (severSplit purity) and #6 (missing-endpoint-prim) both addressed. Push commit 079bdc1 to origin/master; GH Actions auto-deploy.

priorities.title: Per-silhouette gradient (Micro): 12 magic silhouette helpers in bondVisualRenderer.ts extended to lerp colorA→colorB using drawDefaultLine 4-segment pattern. Phase-2 §VI.4 polish.
priorities.council_waiver_reason: Micro tier user-path waiver per §Rule 17; mechanical extension of existing 4-segment pattern. PRIME-AUDIT covers it under batch.
priorities.check_method: Three shared helpers: midColor(p) for ornament center colors; strokeAxisLerp(g, p, ax, ay, bx, by, widthScale?, alphaScale?) for 4-segment A→B straight strokes (filament main, cable parallels, bracket base, wheel diameter, capsule parallels, faint underlays in star/orbital/warped); strokePathLerp(g, p, steps, point(t), widthScale, alphaScale?, colorSegments=8) for curved parametric A→B paths (vortex spiral, whip sine). Endpoint-anchored elements (bracket apex sides, diamond 4 sides, lattice 4 sides, capsule end caps) use respective endpoint's own placerColor per §X.2 'reveal contributions'. Midpoint ornaments (filament rays, wheel ring + rotating spokes, star, orbital rings, lattice cross-hatch, warped 3-fold ring) use midColor. Tests 370 → 377 (+7): fx.capsule same-color 4 strokes back-compat, fx.diamond same-color 1-stroke fast path, fx.capsule cross-color 10 strokes with end caps in respective endpoint colors, fx.diamond cross-color 4-stroke 2+2 distribution, fx.bracket cross-color base lerp + 2 apex sides in endpoint colors, fx.vortex cross-color 8 lerped segments with R-fade-out + B-fade-in monotonic, fx.whip cross-color 8 segments. Typecheck exit 0. Build 394.56 KB main bundle (+0.74 KB net). bondVisualRenderer.ts 447 → 536 LOC (7% over 500 charter; carry-forward S20 to extract magic silhouettes into per-shape files). Push commit f293729 to origin/master; GH Actions auto-deploy.

priorities.title: Scope Amendment urgent BLOCKER fix: pin Nostr relay set in NetTransport. Silent npm bump trystero ^0.20 → ^0.24 since S15 P2; 0.24 picks 5 random relays from 55-default list (appId-seeded shuffle deterministic so both peers same 5, but default list includes many dead / personal / geo-flaky endpoints; both peers stuck connecting). Fix: pin 6 most-deployed public Nostr relays in src/net/transport.ts NOSTR_RELAYS, pass via relayConfig.urls + redundancy = NOSTR_RELAYS.length. LOCKED §13.1 pin updated ^0.20 → ^0.24 + NOTE block codifies relay set + future-bump audit protocol.
priorities.council_waiver_reason: Micro tier Scope Amendment for urgent playtest BLOCKER (1v1 lobby stuck at connecting). User explicit `go` after diagnosis presented. PRIME-AUDIT applied (relay-pin protects against future silent version bumps).
priorities.check_method: A.0 state-discovery via node_modules inspection: confirmed @trystero-p2p/nostr/dist/index.mjs picks 5 of 55 random default relays via shuffle(defaults, strToNum(config.appId)); JoinRoomConfig type definition confirmed relayConfig.urls + relayConfig.redundancy override path. Hypothesis: dead default relay set was cause. Fix: NOSTR_RELAYS const with 6 known-reliable relays passed via relayConfig.urls + redundancy = 6. LOCKED §13.1 amended ^0.20 → ^0.24 + NOTE block. Typecheck exit 0. Build 394.74 KB (+0.18 KB). Push commit 12de8cd; GH Actions deploy success run 25753542269 in 1m1s. **POST-DEPLOY RETEST: FIX DID NOT RESOLVE BLOCKER.** User + brother retested ~18:25 UTC: host shows 'Waiting for Player 2...' with code X5PKK2; client (separate browser, same code) shows 'Connecting...' indefinitely. Same symptom as pre-P4. Relay pin alone insufficient; actual failure layer is downstream (peer handshake / WebRTC ICE / Trystero 0.24 API wrapper). S20 P0 = continue diagnosis: (1) F12 console error capture on host + client browsers, (2) audit transport.ts:54-56 makeAction wrapper vs 0.24 Room type, (3) ICE/TURN config (Google STUN default may fail for symmetric NAT), (4) A/B test downgrade trystero@0.20.0 to isolate version-bump impact, (5) strategy swap to trystero/mqtt or trystero/torrent if Nostr 0.24 confirmed broken.
